cards.front: I read books and listen to music (among other things).
cards.back: 本を読んだり音楽を聴いたりします。
cards.romanized: Hon wo yondari ongaku wo kiitari shimasu.
cards.grammarNote: 〜たり〜たりします = do things like X and Y (non-exhaustive list). Form: ta-form + り (or attach り to the past tense). します at the end.

cards.front: I eat and drink things like that.
cards.back: 食べたり飲んだりします。

cards.front: At work, I do things like have meetings and write emails.
cards.back: 仕事で会議をしたりメールを書いたりします。
cards.romanized: Shigoto de kaigi wo shitari mēru wo kaitari shimasu.
cards.grammarNote: Great for describing job duties with 〜たり〜たり — implies there are other tasks not listed.
cards.literal: Work at meeting [obj] do-and email [obj] write-and do.

cards.front: I help customers and answer the phone.
cards.back: お客様の対応をしたり電話に出たりします。
cards.romanized: O-kyaku-sama no taiō wo shitari denwa ni detari shimasu.
cards.literal: Customer's handling [obj] do-and phone to answer-and do.

cards.front: My hobbies include watching movies and cooking.
cards.back: 趣味は映画を見たり料理をしたりすることです。
cards.romanized: Shumi wa eiga wo mitari ryōri wo shitari suru koto desu.
cards.literal: Hobbies [topic] movie [obj] watch-and cooking [obj] do-and doing thing is.

cards.front: Sometimes I go, sometimes I don't.
cards.back: 行ったり行かなかったりします。
cards.grammarNote: 〜たり〜たり can also list contrasting states: 行ったり行かなかったり = sometimes go, sometimes don't.

cards.front: I read and take walks on my days off.
cards.back: 休みの日は読書したり散歩したりします。
cards.romanized: Yasumi no hi wa dokusho shitari sanpo shitari shimasu.
cards.literal: Day-off [topic] reading do-and walking do-and do.

cards.front: I use the computer and make phone calls.
cards.back: パソコンを使ったり電話をかけたりします。
cards.romanized: Pasokon wo tsukattari denwa wo kaketari shimasu.

cards.back: 宿題をしたり勉強したりします。
cards.romanized: Shukudai wo shitari benkyō shitari shimasu.

cards.front: What kind of things do you do?
cards.back: どんなことをしたりしますか？
cards.romanized: Donna koto wo shitari shimasu ka?

cards.front: I do things like play guitar and sing.
cards.back: ギターを弾いたり歌ったりすることが好きです。
cards.romanized: Gitā wo hiitari utattari suru koto ga suki desu.
cards.literal: Guitar [obj] play-and sing-and doing thing [subj] liked is.
